title: cananga odorata var. fruticosa
intro: Cananga odorata var. fruticosa, also known as the yellow cananga or Kananga, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Cananga odorata var. fruticosa include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Cananga odorata var. fruticosa include essential oils, tea, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
